question: Will Rivian R2 deliveries begin before June 15, 2026?
reason: Rivian's R2 Performance deliveries are scheduled to begin in late spring 2026, aligning with the market's June 30, 2026, resolution date.
evidence: Rivian announced R2 Performance deliveries starting in late spring 2026.
First customer deliveries of the R2 are expected to occur this spring.
Rivian's CEO confirmed that the R2 rollout plan remains unchanged despite recent factory damage.
The R2 Performance model is priced at $57,990 and is the first variant to be delivered.
Rivian's CEO stated that the tornado damage to the factory will not affect the R2's rollout plan.
